title: tessenia aspera
intro: Tessenia aspera, also known as Asperugo procumbens, is a flowering plant in the borage family, Boraginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tessenia aspera include its ability to treat various digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, and to reduce fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin problems.
